{"result":"{\"title\":\"App permission policies - Microsoft Teams admin center\",\"url\":\"https://admin.teams.microsoft.com/policies/app-permission\",\"body\":\"Microsoft Teams admin center\\nоҘ…\\nоў–\\nоқ–\\nKY\\nоңҖ\\nо Ҹ\\nDashboard\\nоҙӮ\\nAdd-on Licenses\\nоҘІ\\nоӨӮ\\nTeams\\nпҷ¶\\nоҘІ\\nоң–\\nUsers\\nпҷ¶\\nоҘІ\\nоқҙ\\nExternal collaboration\\nоЎҖ\\nоҘІ\\nоҘө\\nTeams devices\\nпҷ¶\\nоҘІ\\nоқҢ\\nTeams apps\\nпҷ¶\\nоҘІ\\nоһҮ\\nMeetings\\nоЎҖ\\nоҘІ\\nпғІ\\nMessaging\\nоЎҖ\\nоҘІ\\nоң—\\nVoice\\nоЎҖ\\nоҘІ\\nпү»\\nTeams client health\\nоЎҖ\\nоӨү\\nLocations\\nоЎҖ\\nоҘІ\\nоёҸ\\nFrontline\\nоЎҖ\\nоҘІ\\nпҡқ\\nEnhanced encryption policies\\nоЎҖ\\nпҢҳ\\nPolicy packages\\nоЎҖ\\nо§•\\nPlanning\\nоЎҖ\\nоҘІ\\nо§Ұ\\nAnalytics & reports\\nпҷ¶\\nоҘІ\\nоӘҸ\\nNotifications & alerts\\nпҷ¶\\nоҘІ\\nоң’\\nShow pinned\\nManage app availability from Manage apps\\nSay goodbye to managing app access with permission policies.\\nNow you can manage who can install and use apps directly from the Manage apps page.\\nOpen Manage apps\\nоӨҠ\\nGive feedback\"}","type":"string"}
